pre_cycle_state: Preprint guidance carried the Figure 1/Table 1 travel kit plus the source-family evidence-policy matrix, but it did not yet say when the threshold register or route-impact matrix must travel with source-family prose.
post_cycle_state: Preprint guidance now adds the threshold register whenever prose distinguishes threshold-changing evidence from packaging churn and adds the route-impact matrix whenever prose names hardening order, manuscript payoff, or retrieval limits.
paper_readiness_delta: The manuscript opening package now preserves not only family-role and evidence-use ceilings, but also the exact control surfaces needed for sentence-level publication-impact claims.
remaining_blocker: No source family changed authority state; sf08 remains first, sf09 second, sf11 third.

pre_cycle_state: Table 1 caption guidance named the Figure 1 role register, evidence-policy matrix, and claim-ceiling companion, but not the newer threshold-versus-impact controls.
post_cycle_state: Table 1 caption guidance now also names the threshold register and route-impact matrix so threshold-changing events and exact manuscript-impact surfaces remain coupled to the source-family table.
paper_readiness_delta: Article-architecture reuse is now less likely to flatten blocker rank into generic readiness language or to omit which threshold event actually changes shared claims.
remaining_blocker: Substantive improvement still requires a real sf08, sf09, or sf11 evidence event.

pre_cycle_state: Dashboard-spec guidance required the travel kit, evidence-policy matrix, Route-B blocker register, and host-friction overlay, but still lacked an explicit rule for carrying threshold-versus-impact controls in dashboard or reviewer-note reuse.
post_cycle_state: Dashboard-spec guidance now requires the threshold register when real threshold gains must be distinguished from packaging churn and the route-impact matrix when hardening order, manuscript payoff, or retrieval limits are discussed.
paper_readiness_delta: Future dashboard or reviewer-note reuse can now preserve source-family publication-impact logic instead of rendering Figure 1 as a seeded-family count chart.
remaining_blocker: Shared dashboard export remains blocked on this host and the empirical blocker stack is unchanged.
